This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. The most common herbal preparations made with Grammitis auroreiomena include tea infusions and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
